description: Chill out in style with the Miami series of funky flip-flops from puma. With its soft footbed and strong gripped outsole, the journey in this footwear will be an eventful one.UpperFabric upper for dry comfort of the feetThong straps with stitch detailing and padded innerDual-toned thong straps Thong construction to hold the forefoot in place, and to add comfort and styleMidsoleSoft, cushioned footbed for all-day comfortpuma cat logo on the footbedOutsoleTPR outsole with round suction points all over for grip and tractionshoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp clothDo not machine wash
